summary: Innovative Senior UX/UI Designer with 6+ years of experience crafting user-centered digital products. specialized in mobile app interfaces and accessible web design. Proven track record of improving user retention by 25% through intuitive design systems. Adept at bridging the gap between design and engineering teams.

skills.tech: Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, Principle, HTML5, CSS3, React Basics
skills.soft: User Research, Wireframing, Prototyping, Design Systems, Agile Methodology, Mentorship

additional.hobbies: Urban sketching, hiking, playing guitar, sci-fi novels
